CustomField.formula: IF( INCLUDES(Account.Issues__c , "Difficult Person"), IMAGE("img/msg_icons/error16.png", "Difficult Person"), null ) & " " & IF( INCLUDES(Account.Issues__c , "Refund"), IMAGE("img/msg_icons/error16.png", "Refund"), null ) & " " & IF( INCLUDES(Account.Issues__c , "Chargeback"), IMAGE("img/msg_icons/error16.png", "Chargeback"), null ) & " " & IF( INCLUDES(Account.Issues__c , "See Notes"), IMAGE("img/msg_icons/error16.png", "See Notes"), null )
CustomField.label: Issues Founded
